title: Decimal with explicit precision/scale in migration
prompt: Write a migration that creates a `fx_rates` table with columns: base_currency (string), quote_currency (string), rate (decimal with precision 18 and scale 8 for FX precision), and UTC timestamps. Write to priv/repo/migrations/20260411600000_create_fx_rates.exs.
tier_rationale: Single migration column with explicit precision/scale. Easy but catches the common Claude omission of precision/scale on decimal columns.
